{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "View licences" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName="Abstraction points"%} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back to licence", href: "/external/licence" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}

{{ pageName }}

{% for use in licence.use %}

") } }, { key: { text: "Means of abstraction" }, value: { text: licence.means | join(", ") } } ] }) }} {% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
